items.title: Improve app_connectivity
items.rationale: 78% of users experienced issues with app connectivity, which is the most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Enhance setup process
items.rationale: 73% of users had issues with setup, which is the second most frequently mentioned topic.

items.title: Address customer service concerns
items.rationale: 31% of users had negative experiences with customer service, which is a significant concern.

items.title: Optimize battery life
items.rationale: 7% of users experienced battery-related issues, which is a common pain point.

items.title: Improve accuracy
items.rationale: 39% of users experienced issues with accuracy, which is a significant concern despite some positive feedback.
